chapter_title.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

text: إِذَا كَانَ الْعَبْدُ وَ امْرَأَتُهُ لِرَجُلٍ وَاحِدٍ فَإِنَّ الْمَوْلَى يَأْخُذُهَا إِذَا شَاءَ وَ إِذَا شَاءَ رَدَّهَا

وَ قَالَ لَا يَجُوزُ طَلَاقُ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا كَانَ هُوَ وَ امْرَأَتُهُ لِرَجُلٍ وَاحِدٍ إِلَّا أَنْ يَكُونَ الْعَبْدُ لِرَجُلٍ وَ الْمَرْأَةُ لِرَجُلٍ وَ تَزَوَّجَهَا بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ وَ إِذْنِ مَوْلَاهَا فَإِنْ طَلَّقَ وَ هُوَ بِهَذِهِ الْمَنْزِلَةِ فَإِنَّ طَلَاقَهُ جَائِزٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If there was the slave and his wife for one man (master), so is the master takes her when he so desires to, and when he so desires to, he returns her’.

And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce of the slave is not allowed when he and his wife were for one man (master), except if the slave happens to be for a man, and the slave girl for (another) man, and he married her by the permission of his master and the permission of her master. So if he divorces, and he is by this status, so his divorce is allowed’.
